page.title: Measles — RepurpOS | OpenSourceMedicine
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for Measles: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for Measles: 24 alterations and 11 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

disclaimer: Alterations and therapeutics are aggregated from public databases (Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, DGIdb, and others). Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.

supporting_publications.title: Calcium spirulan, an inhibitor of enveloped virus replication, from a blue-green alga Spirulina, exhibits activity against a variety of viruses.
Ginkgolic acid inhibits fusion of enveloped viruses.

natural_products.name: Vitamin a
natural_products.key_findings: Human Study: Children with measles studied in this New York City outbreak had lower vitamin A levels and were more likely to have a high fever for more than 7 d

supporting_publications.title: Children with measles studied in this New York City outbreak had lower vitamin A levels and were more likely to have a high fever for more than 7 days, be hospitalized, have lower measles antibodies, and increased morbidity.
Ribavirin and high dose vitamin A might be a treatment option for measles pneumonitis in adults.
Vitamin A supplementation may have therapeutic activity in the treatment of measles and respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) infection.
Synergistic Effects of Sulfated Polysaccharides from Mexican Seaweeds against Measles Virus
Laboratory characterization of measles virus infection in previously vaccinated and unvaccinated individuals.
Measles and mumps, especially in case of both infections, were associated with lower risks of mortality from atherosclerotic CVD.
Measles infection protects against allergic disease in children.
